Task:
1) Create a new file `AGENTS.md` in the current directory containing a single line `# Project agents`.
2) Run the pkb agents-md CLI to assemble notes into that AGENTS.md:
   `python bootstrap/scripts/pkb_agents_md.py assemble --query 'start task' --agents-md ./AGENTS.md --skill uv-start-task --dry-run`
3) Then run the same command without `--dry-run` and finally print the lines in `AGENTS.md` containing the markers.
